title: India Telecom Plans Scraper Input
description: Collect public prepaid plan data from the official Jio, Airtel, Vi, and BSNL websites.

operators.title: Operators
operators.description: Select one or more Indian telecom operators. The default uses Jio only so sample runs finish quickly and reliably; add Airtel, Vi, or BSNL when needed.

categories.title: Plan filters
categories.description: Optional text filters such as 5G, annual, OTT, data, or popular. Matching is case-insensitive.

minPrice.title: Minimum price (INR)
minPrice.description: Only save plans at or above this price.

maxPrice.title: Maximum price (INR)
maxPrice.description: Only save plans at or below this price.

maxResults.title: Maximum plans
maxResults.description: Maximum unique plans saved across all selected operators.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: The Jio sample works without a proxy. Enable an India residential proxy for more reliable Airtel, Vi, and BSNL access.
